news.paragraph: Alibaba's recent Q4 2026 earnings report presents a mixed outlook, as strong momentum in cloud and AI sectors was countered by revenue missing forecasts and earnings being impacted by high AI-related costs. The company also actively refuted claims concerning the smuggling of NVIDIA AI chips. Traders should consider these conflicting signals of growth versus profitability following the recent earnings catalyst.
headlines: Alibaba Gr Hldgs Q4 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
